description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-list

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/`
**Sub-components:** hx-list-item

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Item padding, divider, hover highlight. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. list/listitem roles. Navigation list pattern. Selection announcement.
3. **Functionality** ‚Äî Ordered/unordered. Interactive items. Selection (single/multi). Dividers. Nested lists. Icon/avatar prefix.
4. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Dividers. Hover/active states.
6. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî Both list + list-item documented.
7. **Tests** ‚Äî 80%+ coverage. Selection. Keyboard. Nested. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** ‚Äî Basic. Interactive. Nested. With icons/avatars.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Views list. Menu rendering. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** ‚Äî CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-list
